regions.text: (Diagram: Time clock record with station numbers and times like 1:11, 1:12). This record is needed for insurance claims.
Insurance companies pay for fire damage if the building was kept safe. The watchman is part of that safety system.
Companies pay yearly for insurance. The motion picture company must act responsibly to keep the studio safe.
responsible: having a duty. insurance: safety from loss. company: business group. damage: harm done to something. FUTURE: will damage. PRESENT: damage(s). PAST: damaged.
